articles.title: US special forces soldier arrested after allegedly winning $400,000 on Maduro raid
articles.content: The outsized trade involved with Operation Absolute Resolve caught the attention of law enforcement almost immediately. He wagered about $32,000 that Maduro would be “out” by January. The bet was a long-shot. Van Dyke is facing five criminal charges and will make his first court appearance in North Carolina. Van Dyke is an active duty solider stationed at Fort Bragg. No attorney has been listed for him on the court docket. He allegedly made 13 bets from December 27 to January 2, hours before the overnight capture. Prosecutors said Van Dyke sent his more than $400,000 in profits to a foreign cryptocurrency vault before he...
